teasers: Our AI is hand-painting your hero's suit...
Adding a sprinkle of comet dust...

facts.title: Space Fact #1
facts.description: Venus is the hottest planet in our solar system, with a surface temperature of 867°F (464°C)!

facts.title: Space Fact #2
facts.description: The footprints left by astronauts on the Moon will likely stay there for at least 100 million years.

facts.title: Space Fact #3
facts.description: One million Earths could fit inside the Sun – that's a lot of stardust!
